headline: Aduna Accelerates Global Network API Adoption with Major Ecosystem Expansion at MWC
summary: Aduna, the global aggregator of standardized network APIs, today announced at Mobile World Congress key growth milestones demonstrating the acceleration and international adoption of telecom network APIs. Aduna is now partnered with 15 leading digital identity, fraud prevention, and communications providers with more lined up to join the Aduna ecosystem.

headline: Dow and Nasdaq plunge 2% as Amazon data centres hit in Iran war
summary: 10.32am: Iran is 'not just oil any more' as AWS damage moves dial US stocks have extended their slide, with selling accelerating asthe first hour of trading ticks past. The Dow is now down 1,244 points or 2.5% at 47,650, while its descent has been overtaken by the Nasdaq, which has plunged...

headline: Verizon V2X Trial Highlights 5G Edge Potential For New Enterprise Revenue
summary: Verizon Communications (NYSE:VZ) worked with Aptiv and Wind River at MWC Barcelona to run a vehicle-to-everything safety and automation demo. The trial used Verizon’s 5G and edge compute network to share real-time sensor data between vehicles from different manufacturers. The setup showed how cloud-mediated data can support features such as automatic emergency braking and cooperative driving. For investors watching Verizon Communications at a share price of $49.98, this project shows how...
